packageRules.description: Bump the locked version in the lockfile (package-lock.json, pnpm-lock.yaml, yarn.lock, bun.lock) even when the declared range in package.json still satisfies the new version. Without this, ranges like `^1.2.0` never produce a PR for an in-range release (e.g. 1.2.3 -> 1.2.4), and the lockfile drifts.
